records.ety: [L. prosodia the tone or accent of a syllable, Gr. <?/ a song sung to, or with, an accompanying song, the accent accompanying the pronunciation; <?/ to + <?/ song, ode: cf. F. prosodie. See Ode.]

defs: That part of grammar which treats of the quantity of syllables, of accent, and of the laws of versification or metrical composition.
